tags.evidence: Notice your jaw... Now the breath
the first move against a power is to name it
Notice where they actually are
He asked the doctor's question
un-making a fascist by un-making the armor
every body that learns to unhold
He did not only name the armor
In Character Analysis he stated it flatly
I lay down for four months
once the holding stopped
give yourself room to be curious
a body that had finally refused
The woods were being held
safe enough to set the holding down
shake the armor loose
held in a kind of curious attention
You have to sing them there, welcome them
singing together, moving together, sitting still together
my Sensei still teaches me through flashbacks
a practice that puts you in contact with it
you will always recognize it in someone else
would call what happened to me a descent
built a container for and ours has forgotten
The important thing... is to practice
the room arranges itself toward your attention
someone across the fire has recognized in you
running the shift themselves... handling scheduling
practicing a different kind of society
built nothing in the ground that surrounds factories
accumulated in practice, surviving every regime
how water is governed, accumulated in practice
the decision to keep building
The thread has never broken... passed through many hands
paying ferocious attention to the world
The birds she had named
that she fed through the bars
coordinated without either capitalist markets or central planning
decisions made by the people doing the work
Making sure the next generation understood
a tension I want to name before we leave
feeding birds she had named
The commons governing itself through contribution
build the conditions and get out of the way
rotating, non-salaried governance
withdrawn to the mountains — and begun building
the people who came to observe, to learn
People choose to build it... The building is a political act
the conclusion that follows from looking clearly
She was there to document what was about to disappear
and she had named them
the movement refusing to become invisible
first wrote his own name, then wrote the word
nobody pretends that hospitality is natural hierarchy
given the conditions to attend to their own experience
the quality of presence that witnessing requires
when enough of us cultivate that attention
Then they abolished it... canceling it
a neighbor brings food when you're sick
owned and governed by its members
could not yet name what was coming
He defined it in 1936
you follow with your eyes a mountain range
the human face changing color as you walked
held in the hand long enough to see
finding fragments... that the twentieth had buried
would later give this move a name
He called it the dialectical image
Catch it and the present has a tool
